titleStmt.title: SII 7.211: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 211. (A.R. No. 41 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE GURUGALA-BASTI AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyātrailōkyanāthasya
śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ [.] śrīmanmahārājādhirāja harihararāya
na kumāra śrīvīrabukkarāyana rājyakāladoḷu śrīmanmahāpradhāna
joṁmayadaṁṇāyakara pradhānikeyoḷu bācappoḍeyaru maṁgalū
rasthaḷava nāḷuvalli śakava¨rṣa 1329 neya vyaya saṁvatsarada bhādra
pada śuddha 10 budhavāradoḷu Adhikārigaḷu nālvaru ballāḷugaḷayvaru hora
hinavaru sthaḷada sēnabōvanu Appaṇekāṟaneṁbivaru kūḍi puṇyā¨rtthavāgi caṁḍōgrapā¨rśva
dēvara śrīkā¨ryyakke dhārāpū¨rvvakamāgi koṭṭa kṣētrada catusīmeya kramaṁteṁdo
ḍe . kōṭēsaraseṭṭiya beṭṭiṁda mūḍalu Aṁkuśavāḷada nāgarabanadiṁ teṁkalu kāyaraguṁḍi
yiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkaṇadikkina lekkada Ōjinakalliṁda baḍagalu yi kṣētravanu pā[¨rśva]puraveṁdu
hesara niṭṭu dēvara kayyali naṁdādīvigege Arehāḍa Eṁṇneya naḍaIsuveneṁdu nāḍu
nakaradamuṁde pe¨rppaḍe Uttamaseṭṭi mūlavāgi koṁḍanu . Ī bhūmige duḥkha Osage
naṭṭu beḍu Aṭṭaṁtōḍiyaydu nōlatikeḷagoḍakūḍagaṟu mēlōga
ra kāyi meṇasu Aṇiya bhattabēḍettu biṭṭi biḍāra [E]simo
dalādāva bādheyū yilleṁdu sa¨rvvamānyavāgi yikkida śilāśā
sana mī dēvasvado ḷiḷidu guḍiya kaṭṭa salladu . mēliṁdāṇeya nikkasalladu . Aṟe
kittavaṁ gaynūṟu neṟekittavaṁge sāvira [A]rasina tappu dēvarasaṁkēta vidakke tappi
davaruḷḷaḍe paṁcamahāpātakava māḍidavara pāpakke bhājanarapparu .
dānapālanayō¨rmmadhyē dānācchēyōnupālanaṁ [.] dānātsa¨rggamavāpnōti pā
lanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdha
rāṁ . ṣaṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ [.] śrīcaṁḍōgrapā¨rśvanāthāya namaḥ [.]
Digital edition of SII 7.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
